style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with jagged, elongated shadow tendrils stretching unnaturally from Pidgeot's form, slow drifting mist particles swirling in cold blue-white spirals around its body, energy pulses of pale silver light visible through its semi-transparent wings. Eerie purple luminescence casts distorted reflections in nearby puddles, casting a haunting, moonlit atmosphere with soft, diffused lighting that emphasizes the ghostly translucence and unsettling distortion.
